exercises.title: Hybrid Design Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze the security properties of hybrid cryptographic schemes.
hints: Consider what happens if each component is broken individually

exercises.title: Overhead Calculation
exercises.description: Calculate the overhead of hybrid vs classical and PQC-only approaches.

exercises.title: SIKE Case Study
exercises.description: Analyze the SIKE break and implications for hybrid deployment.
tasks: Explain why hybrid would have helped

exercises.title: Hybrid Implementation
exercises.description: Design a hybrid KEM implementation specification.
